signals.headline: South Korea's annual inflation rose to 2
signals.raw:
South Korea's annual inflation rose to 2.2% in March 2026, up from 2.0% in prior months but below 2.4% forecasts | NO | HIGH confidence**[1]

This March figure, the most recent reported from Statistics Korea, signals contained price pressures amid Middle East-driven energy volatility, aligning with the Bank of Korea's 2.2% yearly outlook after holding rates at 2.5% for a sixth meeting last week[1]

signals.headline: Based on the search results from mid-April 2026, here are the key developments:
signals.raw: Based on the search results from mid-April 2026, here are the key developments:

signals.headline: US and Iran discussing second round of negotiations before ceasefire expires**[1][3] | YES | HIGH confidence
signals.raw:
US and Iran discussing second round of negotiations before ceasefire expires**[1][3] | YES | HIGH confidence
A ceasefire between the US and Iran is set to expire within days, and sources indicate both sides are arranging face-to-face discussions to extend talks[1][3]. This directly contrasts with earlier tensions that included a Trump naval blockade of the Strait of Hormuz[1].

signals.headline: Key sticking points in Iran nuclear negotiations**[1] | IDENTIFIED | HIGH confidence
signals.raw:
Key sticking points in Iran nuclear negotiations**[1] | IDENTIFIED | HIGH confidence
The central disputes remain Iran's nuclear program enrichment capabilities, with the US demanding Iran cannot possess nuclear weapons and must surrender enriched uranium stocks, while Iran claims these are for energy purposes[1].

signals.headline: Market impact: S&P 500 wipes out 2026 losses on peace prospects**[1] | YES | HIGH confidence
signals.raw:
Market impact: S&P 500 wipes out 2026 losses on peace prospects**[1] | YES | HIGH confidence
Stock markets have rallied significantly on hopes of Iran deal resolution, with the S&P 500 recovering all 2026 losses as of mid-April[1]. Oil prices have also declined on these de-escalation hopes[1].
